item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
strip clubs aren't really my scene but this made me laugh
i guess
as is tradition
chimkin
i'm usually that friend
this is me right now
love all these guys but it's kinda true. moreso for walken and gottfried than freeman and goldblum imo
mmm hmm
unfortunately
that cantina chicken shit is good
I have absolutely zero idea what anything in this meme is talking about/referencing
the horror classic we all love
i'm a little scared
is there any other kind of corollance?
a big favorite as a lad
if you don't have one, yes you do because uncle cel is your friend
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Follow the resistance
item.description: You can see their history back the last bout 24 hours, including when they released very early that Musk has access to OPM. From 24 hours they grew another 20k fed employee. Remember when the Natl park services were one of the first resistance groups in the first 4 yrs.

item.dc:creator: JKBenton

item.title: MRW I get a message from the mods warning me not to post any Intergalactic Quality on the weekend because the servers need that time to recover.
item.description: Source: This is a historic clip for the music industry. Those of you who don’t know, the gentleman singing is Mexican singer Chalino Sanchez. In the beginning, you can see him holding a note that he’s visibly reading in this video. The note is said to have been a death threat for performing in Sinaloa, MX after he had been warned not to. This was his last concert and the last footage of him alive as the following day his body was found bound with two gunshots to the head. This man knew his time was limited, regardless he performed as promised and gave the crowd what they paid for. It ultimately cost him his life. RIP Sorry for the poor quality the original is pretty rough too. #IntergalacticQualityGifs (Check WiFi)
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: UK rappers open new supermarket to help minorities 'feel seen' | REUTERS
item.description: Award-winning rap duo Casyo Johnson and Karl Wilson (Krept and Konan) are set to open a new supermarket to help ethnic minorities ‘feel seen.’ Shoppers will be able to bulk-buy halal meat, exotic fish and fruits, as well as ethnic hair and beauty products. Read the story here: https://reut.rs/3EgsUZz
item.dc:creator: smallteam

item.title: Maybe we should be concerned...
item.description: FBI top brass fired. Prosecutors fired. Union contracts busted. Tariffs. Elon inside the Treasury. And more. All in 2 weeks. I feel like I'm in a bad dystopian movie from the early 80s... https://www.huffpost.com/entry/donald-trump-inauguration-live-updates_n_678a8f36e4b097ab56976f5b/liveblog_679e963ce4b06e8d96a6e04a
item.dc:creator: AbeFromanPartyOf3

item.title: Hissed connections (a 48-page fantasy comedy. Snake included!)
item.description:
I need to interrupt here for a second because this page and the next are often met with the question if this is an erotic or intimate answer. It is not, but it sure as heck is an awkward one!
Oh! Before you go slithering off there...had a couple of extra bonus pages made a little after too!
Also have been playing around with the idea of remastering this comic someday to meet up with my current style. Think it would be some great fun! That's a discussion for a much later time though haha!
If you made it this far, hey bless! We all have limited time in the day so I appreciate you giving up some of yours on a thing like me and my stories. If you enjoy the art and stories I work on, I could seriously use the help right now with any support on my Patreon. Things are starting to go on a downward trend at a really bad time now. Don't feel obligated of course, but I take my shots where I can. https://www.patreon.com/join/Shane_Frost
item.dc:creator: shanefrost
